title: vincetoxicum puberulum
intro: Vincetoxicum puberulum, also known as the Chinese milkvetch or pubescent swallowwort, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various types of infections. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as alleviate symptoms of fever and infections. Herbal preparations of Vincetoxicum puberulum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
